description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by dense landscaping, including a perimeter of tall evergreen trees and a manicured lawn. The building features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of light and dark exterior wall finishes, likely a combination of concrete, wood, and glass. The property is enclosed by a dark fence, with a paved driveway leading to a garage area and a small parking space. The front yard is open and green, while the backyard is more secluded with additional trees and a patio area. The bungalow appears to have a single story, with a spacious, open-plan layout and multiple access points. Decorative shrubs and flowering trees add color and texture to the landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of concrete, wood, and glass, surrounded by dense trees and a manicured lawn within a fenced property.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above the backyard, highlighting the dense tree coverage and the open rear patio area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the bungalow from a side angle, emphasizing the tree-lined perimeter and the green lawn in front of the house.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the bungalow, including the driveway, garage, and main entrance, with flowering trees and a clear view of the fence.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the opposite side, showing the driveway, parking area, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the fence.
